sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.title: Trash
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.help: Restored pages keep their original folder name including the sorting number. If the sorting of the sibling pages has changed in the meantime, re-sort the restored page manually.
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.dialog.postpo: Keep "{title}" for one more day? The retention period restarts from now.
Keep "{title}" for another {days} days? The retention period restarts from now.
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.cleaned.one: 1 expired item has just been removed by the automatic cleanup.
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.cleaned.many: {count} expired items have just been removed by the automatic cleanup.
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.column.title: Title
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.issue.notRead: The trash storage folder "{path}" is not readable. Check its permissions and the plugin's root option.
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.issue.notCrea: The trash storage folder "{path}" cannot be created. Check the plugin's root option — custom folder setups have to point it at their storage location.
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.dialog.restor: Do you really want to restore "{title}"?
sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.dialog.delete: Do you really want to permanently delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
Do you really want to permanently delete 1 item ({size}) from the trash? This cannot be undone.
Do you really want to permanently delete all {count} items ({size}) from the trash? This cannot be undone.
error.sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.notFoun: The trash item could not be found
error.sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.missing: The original parent page "{parent}" does not exist anymore
error.sigtrygg-space.kirby-trash.permiss: You are not allowed to do this
